raw_consumer_statement: At XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/, I received an e-mail alerting me to a purchase on my Citibank XXXX XXXX XXXX card in the amount of {$10.00} including taxes. The purchase of XXXX gallons of regular unleaded gasoline was made at a XXXX XXXX located at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. At the time I received the e-mail, I was sitting in my office at home in possession of my credit card. My wife does not drive nor have a card for this account, nor does anyone else. I suspect my credit card information may have been skimmed from a gasoline pump during my last fill up at the XXXX XXXX located at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX on XXXX XXXX XXXX
